{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1126e92e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Tuning a cavity to a target frequency\n",
    "\n",
    "The fundamental (accelerating) frequency of an elliptical cell is fixed by its\n",
    "equator radius `Req`. `cav.tune` adjusts a chosen geometry handle until the mode\n",
    "lands on a target, re-solving the eigenmode at every step. Here we tune a single\n",
    "cell to **1300 MHz** by moving `Req`.\n",
    "\n",
    "See the [tuning guide](../../tuning)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "7e5863c8",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T15:46:17.811944Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T15:46:17.811791Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.835344Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.834701Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3cd5cdc9",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. A detuned starting cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "A TESLA-like cell whose equator radius is deliberately too large, so its\n",
    "fundamental sits below the target and the tuner has something to do."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "25171109",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.837265Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.837050Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.962718Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.961952Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "start = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.7, 108.0]   # Req = 108 mm -> below 1300 MHz\n",
    "cav = EllipticalCavity(1, start, start, start, beampipe='none', name='tune')\n",
    "cav.set_workspace(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'tune'))\n",
    "\n",
    "ax = cav.plot('geometry', show=False)\n",
    "ax.set_title('before tuning (Req = 108 mm)')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "fd6e8cd0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Tune `Req` to 1300 MHz\n",
    "\n",
    "`cell_type={'mid-cell': 'Req'}` names the handle; the nested `eigenmode_config`\n",
    "controls the solve used at each tuning step. The tuner reports the converged\n",
    "equator radius and the frequency it reached."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "d050c9f1",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.964385Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T15:46:19.964244Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.555182Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.554514Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "reached 1300.000 MHz at Req = 103.365 mm\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.tune.run({'freqs': 1300.0,\n",
    "              'cell_type': {'mid-cell': 'Req'},\n",
    "              'eigenmode_config': {'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                                   'mesh_config': {'h': 6, 'p': 2}}})\n",
    "res = cav.tune.qois['mid-cell']\n",
    "print(f\"reached {res['FREQ']:.3f} MHz at Req = {res['parameters']['Req_m']:.3f} mm\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d8c0f9cb",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. Convergence history\n",
    "\n",
    "Each secant step moves `Req` and re-solves; the frequency homes in on the target."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "abb0aecc",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.557111Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.556953Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.691047Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.689914Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "(<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>,\n",
       " array([<Axes: xlabel='Iteration', ylabel='Req_m'>,\n",
       "        <Axes: xlabel='Iteration', ylabel='freq [MHz]'>], dtype=object))"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.tune.plot_convergence()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "7382b88c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. The tuned cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "`cav.tuned` is a fresh cavity living in `<workspace>/tuned/`. Solving *its*\n",
    "eigenmode independently confirms the tuned geometry really sits on the target —\n",
    "the tuner and a from-scratch solve agree."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "515890bb",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.693376Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T15:46:32.693218Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T15:46:36.109400Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T15:46:36.108842Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "tuned cavity fundamental: 1300.039 MHz\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.tuned.eigenmode.run({'polarisation': 'monopole',\n",
    "                         'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                         'mesh_config': {'h': 6, 'p': 2}})\n",
    "print(f\"tuned cavity fundamental: {cav.tuned.eigenmode.qois['freq [MHz]']:.3f} MHz\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
